headline: Chinese Bonds Near Inflection Point as Inflation Path Shifts
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Chinese bonds may be reaching an historic turning point, with yields climbing from record low levels as deflationary pressures ease and expectations for monetary loosening recede.The benchmark 10-year yield has the potential to finally break out of its recent narrow trading range and rise toward 2% or even higher this year from around 1.8% now, some analysts say. Meanwhile, the yield spread between five-year and 30-year notes, a measure of inflation expectations and supply pressur

headline: How The Accor (ENXTPA:AC) Investment Story Is Shifting With Mixed Analyst Valuation Calls
summary: Analysts recently adjusted their fair value estimate for Accor from €56.68 to €55.71, a reduction of about €0.96 per share. This tweak sits within a broader mix of target cuts and target raises and reflects different views on how confidently Accor can deliver on its growth and margin plans. As you read on, you will see what is driving those opinions and how to keep track of the evolving story around the stock. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story. Head over to our Company...

headline: Seagate Tests Breakout After Top Pick Designation By Morgan Stanley, Called 'Underappreciated' AI Stock
summary: Seagate Technology stock jumped Monday morning, breaking out above a consolidation pattern entry. The hard-disk drive maker was named top pick by Morgan Stanley. Seagate stock has rocketed 67% higher this year and is ahead 595% compared with 12 months ago.

headline: Stocks Edge Up as Traders Weigh Ceasefire Chances: Markets Wrap
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Signs of last-ditch efforts to secure a truce in the war that has rattled global markets spurred a cautious advance in stocks as oil whipsawed.Equities rose for a fourth straight session, with the S&P 500 set for its longest winning streak since January as investors parsed conflicting headlines about a push toward a ceasefire in the Middle East. US crude hovered around $112. Bonds wavered.Iran rejected a proposed truce as a Tuesday deadline from President Donald Trump looms to re-

headline: How The Prudential (LSE:PRU) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Capital Returns
summary: Prudential’s fair value estimate has shifted only slightly, with the model price target moving from £13.71 to £13.73 per share, keeping the headline valuation change fairly muted. That small move sits against a backdrop of analysts setting targets across a wide band, from around £12.70 to £15.00 and adjusting individual views by as much as £50 or more. This highlights how differently the same set of fundamentals is being interpreted. Reading on, you will see what is driving these moves and...

headline: Oil Climbs, Stocks Whipsaw After Trump’s Warning: Markets Wrap
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Oil climbed and stocks whipsawed after President Donald Trump signaled that an escalation of strikes on Iran could come as soon as Tuesday, overshadowing hopes for a ceasefire.Fears that imminent military action could derail tentative progress toward restoring energy flows through the Strait of Hormuz drove US crude above $112.
